name: Nicotinamide riboside and exercise healthy-longevity registry
summary: Recruiting registry combining NR supplementation and exercise training for healthy longevity, with no posted results.
population: Adults in a healthy-aging and metabolic-disease risk context

trial_details.expected_results_window: The registry lists estimated primary completion in Dec. 2025 and study completion in Mar. 2026; no posted results were present in the Jun. 8, 2026 API view.
trial_details.horizon_note: Exercise co-intervention means any future result will require taxonomy care before attribution to NR.
trial_details.why_it_matters: Results could clarify whether NAD or redox-restoration programs translate biomarker target engagement into prespecified function, physiology, safety, or disease-boundary outcomes.
